message.content:
Review the following change as a Pull Request reviewer (focus on test compatibility):

**Task**: Delete src/TO_BE_REMOVED folder and update test files to use @semparar/design-system-app theme.

**Test files updated**:
1. __tests__/__mocks__/utils/test-provider.tsx
2. __tests__/screens/InvoiceCashback/InvoiceCashback.test.tsx
3. __tests__/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/MyOrdersRewardProgram.test.tsx
4. __tests__/atomic/organisms/LearnMorePointsSection/index.test.tsx

**Review focus**:
1. Will the theme from design-system-app provide the same color tokens (like BRAND_BASE_01, INTENSE_COLOR_01) that the tests expect?
2. Is the ThemeProvider wrapper working correctly with the new theme import?
3. Any potential test failures from this change?

Read the test files:
- /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/__tests__/__mocks__/utils/test-provider.tsx
- /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/__tests__/screens/InvoiceCashback/InvoiceCashback.test.tsx
- /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/__tests__/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/MyOrdersRewardProgram.test.tsx

Also verify the design-system-app theme exports the expected colors by checking:
- /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/node_modules/@semparar/design-system-app/src/styles/themeDefault.ts (look for colors export)

This is research only - provide your review findings.
